name: keel-marketplace
description: Keel AI-SDLC plugin marketplace by Amar Singh (@creativemyntra). Provides the full keel pipeline for Claude Code and Claude Desktop.

plugins.name: keel
plugins.description: Complete AI-SDLC pipeline for Claude Code and Claude Desktop. 15 specialized agents across a 10-phase pipeline (dedicated UI design, code+unit-tests in one phase, QA, Playwright E2E, and security phases) with a deterministic state engine, execution-verified gates, bounded retries with human resume, cross-story memory, proactive watchers, and a read-only pipeline status dashboard. Stack: CakePHP 4.4 / PHP 8.1 (production-proven). Laravel/Django/Rails on the roadmap.
